fixes_applied: tests/test_manifest.yaml: aligned f2p_upstream_migration_completeness command to also search v2_compatible_migrations/ alongside migrations/, matching the prior-batch fix already in tests/test.sh. The manifest command is documentation-only at runtime (test.sh writes reward.txt directly via the v043 weighted-replace tail), but consistent search paths prevent regression if a future runner uses the manifest gate command.
notes: Prior-batch FIX VERIFIED in tests/test.sh. Gate 5 (line 317): MIG_UPS=$(find migrations v2_compatible_migrations -mindepth 2 -maxdepth 2 -name 'up.sql') — both layouts credited. Upstream f2p_upstream_migration_completeness (lines 469-471): grep -rq <marker> migrations/ v2_compatible_migrations/ for all three column names — both layouts credited. Without these, the canonical PR #9466 patch (migrations under v2_compatible_migrations/) would silently lose 0.30 of total reward (Gate5 0.10 + upstream migration 0.20). Anti-over-fit posture is solid: 7 inner F2P gates totalling 1.00 are compile-probes — synthetic Rust modules that import dsl::<col>, struct fields, and Insertable struct fields, plus full cargo check on hyperswitch_domain_models (Gate 6) and router (Gate 7) under feature v2. These accept any correct implementation regardless of field type / visibility / derives. The 2 upstream gates are file-specific greps but target canonical v2 event-serialization sites (payments.rs + 2 kafka files) — narrowness justified. Score formula correct: WEIGHTS sum=0.4, inner_weight=0.6, p2p_failed hard-coded False (cargo metadata = informational per CLAUDE.md), existing<=0 guard present, weighted-replace shape per c8bc168a. v2_OK gate-skip suppresses Gates 2-4,6,7 only when the v2 base build itself fails — correct, since the probes would be untestable. allow_internet placement under [environment] (verified). USER agent + /installed-agent setup present. Solo curation verdict: KEEP-with-FIX confirmed.
